entries.name: athlete-roll-age-group-snapshot
entries.purpose: Nightly 02:00 UTC: recompute current_age_group_id for every active + paused athlete. Fires AthleteAgeGroupSnapshotUpdated on flips.

entries.name: athlete-check-minor-turned-adult
entries.purpose: Daily 03:00 UTC: check for athletes crossing minor_min_age (16) and legal_adult_age (18) boundaries + fire AthleteMinorTurnedAdult.

entries.name: athlete-reconcile-consents
entries.purpose: Daily 04:00 UTC: 12-month re-consent reminders + expired-consent flagging. Only fires for tenants carrying athlete_consent_workflow entitlement.

entries.name: athlete-purge-archived
entries.purpose: Daily 05:00 UTC: 90-day PII redaction pass + 7-year hard-purge pass + medical_history purge.

entries.name: athlete-auto-link-user
entries.purpose: Hourly at 15 minutes past: sweep unlinked adult athletes for email matches with newly-created Users. Auto-links + fires AthleteLinkedToUser.
